title: Chauffeur Receipt Dump
body: Expense receipts reveal that your retention package includes more leather than strategy.

title: Slot Value Diligence
body: A potential buyer decides the slots may be worth the cleanup if the story can survive another quarter.

title: Merger Term Sheet
body: A cautious term sheet arrives, written by people who dislike your balance sheet and adore your gates.

title: Nominee Director Jitters
body: The offshore structure still works in theory, but one nominee director is suddenly difficult to reach.

title: Correspondent Bank Query
body: A bank asks a simple question about ownership and ruins everyone's afternoon.
